text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black's debut race will be in a few days,
but before then, she decides to do a partner run
with Satono Diamond.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I-I did it! I reached finish line without you passing
me once, Dia!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
H-huh? But I always manage to overtake you...
Something's different about you today...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yay! You mean all my training is paying off?!
Woohoo!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Dia! Thanks for always doing partner runs with
me! I couldn't have gotten this far without you!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Nothing at all! Your debut race is soon, right? Do
your best, Kita!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of her debut race has arrived.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer? There's somewhere I wanna go
before the race starts. Is that okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black leads us to Tokyo Racecourse's
track.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Here it is... The very first stage of my running
career...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I've still got plenty of growing to do, but I don't
plan on disrespecting the audience in any way. I'm
going to do my very best here.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Let's have a good race today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black bows to the racecourse. The race
we've dedicated so much time and energy to is
about to begin.
